title: Casey's Announces Timing of First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's General Stores, Inc. (“Casey's” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: CASY), one of the leading convenience store chains in the United States, will issue first quarter fiscal 2024 results after the market closes on September 11th, 2023. Casey's will hold a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, September 12th at 7:30am central to review the quarterly results. A live webcast of the event will be available on Casey's website on the Investor Relations page at https://i.

title: Casey's General Stores: Much To Like About The Investment Thesis, Except The Price
text: Casey's General Stores, Inc. has resumed its M&A activities after refraining from doing so for a while. The company focuses on smaller towns with fewer than 5,000 inhabitants to create a deep-rooted presence. Casey's has announced plans to open 350 new stores in the next three years and aims to grow EBITDA by 8-10% per year through 2026.

title: Casey's (CASY) to Add 63 Convenience Stores, Up 16.7% in a Year
text: Casey's (CASY) unveils plans to acquire 63 convenience stores from EG America, LLC. The deal strategically fits with the company's plans to accelerate store growth.

title: Casey's Agrees to Acquire 63 Convenience Stores From EG Group
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's General Stores, Inc. (“Casey's”) (Nasdaq: CASY) today announced an agreement to acquire 63 convenience stores from EG America, LLC (“EG America”), a subsidiary of EG Group Ltd. (“EG Group”). The stores are located in Kentucky and Tennessee, and currently operate under the Minit Mart and Certified Oil banners. Casey's and EG America, two of the leading convenience store chains in the United States, anticipate the deal will close later this year, subject to.

title: Casey's Kicks Off Fourth Annual Cash for Classrooms Campaign
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's is kicking off its in-store giving campaign to support America's future generation of leaders. Starting today through September 5, Casey's guests can round up their purchases each time they visit a Casey's store and join the cause that has raised $3 million for students, families and educators since 2020. “Learning is the foundation to sparking curiosity and creating brighter futures for kids.
